description: Generic HMAC-signed JSON dispatch to a tenant-configured HTTPS endpoint. Escape hatch for tenants with a custom data warehouse or an unlisted provider.

wire_protocol.note: Endpoint URL validated against tenant.allowed_egress_domains (from settings) at CREATE + at every dispatch. Anti-exfiltration control.

endpoint_url.description: HTTPS endpoint. Must match tenant.allowed_egress_domains at CREATE.

signature_header.description: Header name for the HMAC signature.

timestamp_header.description: Header for the request timestamp — caller includes in HMAC computation to prevent replay.

custom_headers.description: Additional static headers included on every request. Auth-Bearer via 'Authorization: Bearer XYZ' etc.

wrap_shape.description: Payload wrap: 'single' = the event row; 'batch_array' = [event, event, ...]; 'data_envelope' = { events: [...], meta: { count, batch_id } }.
